data.name: Femboy Next Door 🔞🚪
data.detailed_description:
Femboy Next Door is an adult visual novel about ambition, masks, temptation, and the thin line between content and real life.



You’re a struggling young blogger who wins a once-in-a-lifetime chance to spend a month in a luxury influencer house. Cameras everywhere. Ring lights glowing 24/7. Every room designed for the perfect shot. Collabs, private parties, staged moments — it’s all part of the lifestyle now.



Officially, you’re here to grow your channel.
Unofficially? You’re gathering material for a scandalous exposé.

But the deeper you get into the house’s vibe, the harder it becomes to separate performance from reality. Behind the filters and viral clips, there are real stories, hidden motives, and emotions that don’t follow any script.

Game Features:


🎥 A stylish, story-driven experience set inside an elite influencer mansion
💬 Choices that shape relationship dynamics and the tone of the story
🏠 A modern content-ready villa packed with streamer aesthetics
🔞 A wide variety of 18+ adult content with a bold, provocative edge
🔥 Intimate, tension-filled scenes that unfold naturally as the story progresses

This is a story about playing a role… and realizing you might not be in control of the narrative anymore.

Open the door — and decide what matters more: the hype or something way more personal. 🚪

data.short_description: A struggling blogger moves into a luxury femboy influencer house to create content — and secretly write a scandalous exposé. But behind the cameras, parties, and viral clips, temptation grows, lines blur, and emotions get dangerously real. 🔞🚪
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
